description: Duplicate cart events inflate conversion metrics
expectedBehavior: One ITEM_ADDED_TO_CART event per add action
actualBehavior: Adding to cart fires two events, doubling cart add counts in dashboard
testHint: Add one item to cart and assert exactly one ITEM_ADDED_TO_CART event exists in the events table

actualBehavior: productId is null in PRODUCT_VIEWED events
testHint: View a product and assert the PRODUCT_VIEWED event in DB has a non-null productId

description: Event timestamp stored in wrong timezone
expectedBehavior: Timestamps stored and returned in UTC
actualBehavior: Timestamps stored in local server timezone without UTC offset
testHint: Assert event timestamp ends with 'Z' or '+00:00' indicating UTC

description: Price in event payload differs from product table
expectedBehavior: priceAtTimeOfAdd matches product.price at time of event
actualBehavior: priceAtTimeOfAdd is always the base price, never the sale price
testHint: Add a sale-price product to cart and assert event metadata.priceAtTimeOfAdd equals salePrice

description: ORDER_SUBMITTED event fires even when order fails
expectedBehavior: ORDER_FAILED event fires on failure, ORDER_SUBMITTED fires only on success
actualBehavior: ORDER_SUBMITTED event is always emitted regardless of order outcome
testHint: Trigger a failed order and assert only ORDER_FAILED event exists, not ORDER_SUBMITTED

description: Event accepted but aggregation does not update
expectedBehavior: Metrics dashboard reflects events within one aggregation cycle
actualBehavior: Events persist in DB but dashboard totals do not change until manual refresh
testHint: Emit event, wait for aggregation window, assert dashboard metric incremented

description: Search events grouped under wrong category
expectedBehavior: PRODUCT_SEARCHED events include the correct category from the filter applied
actualBehavior: All search events group under category 'all' regardless of active filter
testHint: Search with category filter active and assert event metadata.category matches filter value
